current_objective: Implement contradiction cases for reflexive cluster escapes

case_split_G_neg_delta.details: Implemented at lines 459, 569, 622 - inl case proven via delta/neg(delta) contradiction, inr case (F(delta) in M') remains

case_split_M_prime_sees_witness.details: Implemented at lines 849, 887 - pos case proven via T4 transitivity M' -> witness -> M contradicts h_not_R', neg case remains

approaches_tried.result: fails - W having delta and neg(delta) requires W ~ M' AND G(neg(delta)) in M'
approaches_tried.insight: Only works when G(neg(delta)) in M' (inl case), not when F(delta) in M' (inr case)

approaches_tried.result: works when M' sees V and V sees M
approaches_tried.insight: Derives M' sees M, contradicting h_not_R'. Only works when M' sees the witness.

next_steps: Implement Pattern C: seriality escape from reflexive M' to M'' > M' strictly
Apply density(M, M'') to get witness W' between M and M''
Show W' is also between M and M' (since M'' > M')
